title: Cobblemon Outbreaks
description: Adds Pokémon Scarlet & Violet style mass outbreaks to Cobblemon with progressive shiny rates!
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- **Cobblemon Outbreaks** Bring Scarlet/Violet-style mass outbreaks into Cobblemon, with biome-aware species selection, wave-based encounters, progression shiny odds, and server-friendly announcements. **Mass Outbreak Events** - Outbreaks spawn on a timer and run for a configurable duration. - Each outbreak targets one species and progresses through configurable waves. - Supports automatic outbreaks and admin-started outbreaks via command. **Biome-Aware Species Selection** - By default, outbreak species are selected from Pokémon that can spawn in the local biome/location. - Optional filters for biome tags/IDs and blacklist tags. - Optional anti-repeat logic to deprioritize recently used species. **Wave Spawning System** - Configurable wave count and per-wave spawn range. - Optional respawn-on-defeat behavior. - Distance and cleanup controls to keep outbreaks contained and performant. **Shiny Progression** - Configurable base shiny rate and progression thresholds. - Shiny odds improve as players defeat/capture more outbreak Pokémon. **Pokémon Stat Boost Controls** - Configurable outbreak boosts such as guaranteed perfect IVs, minimum IV floors, hidden ability chance, and egg move options. **Bossbar + Broadcast Messaging** - Server-side bossbar with compact useful info (species, wave, shiny rate). - Configurable global announcements for spawn/start/end. - Optional clickable coordinates and optional Xaero/JourneyMap waypoint payload announcements. **Rewards** - Optional completion rewards via EXP orbs and configurable item drops. **Commands** /outbreak start - Starts an outbreak at your location using biome-appropriate species selection. /outbreak start /outbreak start /outbreak stop /outbreak info /outbreak reload **Datapack Species Support** - Optional datapack-driven species pools for custom server balancing/content. **Server-Focused Design** - Core logic is server-authoritative and suitable for multiplayer servers. - No required custom client HUD; outbreaks are communicated through standard server-visible systems (bossbar/chat). **Requirements** Cobblemon: 1.6.0+ Architectury API 13.0.8+ **Optional:** Xaero’s Minimap / Journey Map
